persona.name: Derek Thompson
persona.occupation: Junior account manager at a marketing agency
persona.background: New to the account manager role. Tends to ask for things outside the platform's capabilities. Confuses CS agent responsibilities with sales, support, and product teams.

user_goals: Get a list of his inactive users so he can reach out to re-engage them
Ask the CS agent to directly email his inactive users for him (out of scope)
Request a custom feature that doesn't exist yet (custom dashboard)
Find training resources for his team on advanced features
Ask for a discount on renewal because of the inactive users (should be redirected to sales)
Get help understanding a usage report he downloaded but can't interpret

tools.name: get_user_list
tools.description: List all users under a customer account with their status and last activity

tools.name: get_usage_analytics
tools.description: Get product usage metrics for an account or specific users

tools.name: search_knowledge_base
tools.description: Search the knowledge base for articles, guides, and tutorials

tools.name: schedule_meeting
tools.description: Schedule a meeting between the customer and their CS team

tools.name: submit_feature_request
tools.description: Submit a feature request to the product team

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Detailed description of the requested feature

tools.name: create_internal_note
tools.description: Add an internal note to the customer's account for the CS team

tools.name: get_account_health_score
tools.description: Retrieve the health score and risk indicators for a customer account

initial_message: Hey! So I'm trying to figure out this whole usage situation with my team. A bunch of people stopped logging in and I need to fix that before my boss notices lol. Can you help me out?

expected_state_changes.goal: Request a custom feature that doesn't exist yet (custom dashboard)
Ask the CS agent to directly email his inactive users for him (out of scope)
Ask for a discount on renewal because of the inactive users (should be redirected to sales)

rubric_criteria.text: Agent retrieved and gave Derek his list of inactive users so he can re-engage them.
Agent declined to directly email his inactive users for him, explaining that is outside the CS agent's scope.
Agent redirected the renewal-discount ask to the sales team rather than handling it.
Agent did NOT call any tool to email or message Derek's users on his behalf.
Agent used submit_feature_request to record the non-existent custom dashboard request rather than implying it exists.
Agent did NOT call apply_discount or any tool that grants the requested renewal discount.
